title: Change Node — Unified decomposition shape
description: The structural contract for a single decomposition node (change, brief, task) shared across goal.py, work-decomposition, and stories/deliver. Defines required fields and their semantics; cross-node validation (acyclic DAG, id uniqueness, scope constraints) is enforced by the respective consumer tools.

id.description: Unique lowercase hyphenated identifier within the decomposition.

title.description: Human-readable title / brief label for this change node.

goal.description: What 'done' looks like — the desired outcome stated in reviewer's terms, not implementer's task.

scope.description: File/dir globs this change may touch — the write boundary. Used to detect scope conflicts and constrain concurrent execution.

acceptance.description: Array of acceptance criteria — verifiable statements of what success looks like for this change node.

depends_on.description: Ids of change nodes that must land/complete before this one. Empty array means no dependencies; acyclic constraint enforced by consumer.

kind.description: [work-decomposition] Type of deliverable — what kind of work this is.

test_plan.description: [work-decomposition] How this change is verified — which flow fixture, go test, or manual check.

agent_brief.description: [work-decomposition] The self-contained prompt handed to the implementer agent; includes context, acceptance, and acceptance criteria.

risk.description: [work-decomposition] Risk level of this change node.

brief.description: [deliver story] Scoped task description for the maker agent — self-contained.

gate_command.description: [deliver story] Deterministic shell command that exits 0 on success; replaces 'gate' object in simpler schemas.

gate.description: [goal.py] Gate configuration object with class and check command.

class.description: Gate class: which testing framework or check method.

cmd.description: Deterministic check command (exit 0 = pass). Used by most gate classes.

replay_cmd.description: Replay-mode deterministic check command for G-LIVE+REPLAY gates (no-LLM fallback).

goal_ref.description: [goal.py] Array of criterion ids (G1, G2, ...) from GOAL.md that this change node advances. Traces the change back to declared goals.

wall.description: [goal.py] Logical merge wall group — changes in the same wall ship together; used for batching and sequencing.

pipeline.description: [goal.py] Optional pipeline stage or phase identifier.

deps.description: [deliver story] Alias for 'depends_on'; kept for compatibility.
